reviews.review_title: Fails to log in every single time
reviews.review_description:
This just angers me. Can't log in no matter what. Gives log in failed 5003 error. Why even bother launching? Just delete it and save your brand credibility until you have something that works.

Edit. Saw this was updated, still cannot even log in with any account type or login method. Do better.

Edit2. Managed to log in for the first time and make a call March 21, 2026. Worked pretty well.

This is definitely useful and I'm sure our Avatars will be used in other apps too like Whatsapp, Instagram and others. 
Meta Codecs, like Apple Personas will be great here for this use case. 
I want to know if there's a way to change the distance between the Avatar and the camera. Right now, my avatar is at a near full-body length distance. I'd like the option of shoulder-length distance too. The app images display that distance, so I need to play around to find out how to set that.

yes, I get a zoom screen like in a virtual desktop. But I don't get an avatar. Best I can do is to select an avatar from zoom, but it is not moving. disappoint, since I get the Feeling I do something wrong.

I subscribe to Zoom and this is such a great addition! I often host Zoom meetings with clients, and on days I don't feel like being on camera, it's super convenient to check in quickly without all the extra steps. As a tarot reader, I love that I can show my passthrough environment—or even take clients with me into the metaverse to give them a taste of what the hype is all about. I’m really happy they finally brought Zoom to VR.

It would be nice if I could easily share my PC screen or add people directly from the Horizon app into Zoom. Right now, you have to do it manually, which takes a little time. But overall, this is a fantastic step forward, and I’m excited to see what new features are coming next.

I really like this so far, but this really needs support for Zoom rooms. In my team, they are an essential must have and not being able to join rooms and see who is in which room makes it unfortunately largely unusable for me. ￼
Pretty cool to be able to use your VR Avatar in a Zoom Call! Movements are tracked as well. Looking forward to more updates!
